rationale: Both evaluations give an identical 4/10 score with the same justification, identical strengths, and the same concerns. The only textual difference is 'German language proficiency is basic' vs 'German language skills are basic' — a trivial rewording with identical meaning, well within run-to-run noise. None of the reasoning keys off the changed employer names (re:cinq/Optilyz/GISCollective vs Stripe/Shopify/Datadog); the model treated the candidate identically.
